scope.title: Fire Emergencies
items: Fire incidents within the premises (home/common areas)
Immediate support required to control or respond
Assistance in using fire extinguishers / alerting authorities

howItWorks: In case of emergency, post a message in the WhatsApp group
Nearby residents / trained volunteers will respond immediately

A set of trained "RMV SOS Warriors" will assist in medical emergencies, guide and act during fire incidents, help use available facilities (wheelchairs, extinguishers, etc.), and coordinate with emergency services if needed
emergencyExamples: Elderly person needs urgent hospital transport
Child with seizures / severe allergic reaction
Fire inside a flat / kitchen fire spreading
Gas leak with risk of explosion
